summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Realm of Aethoria Phase 3 polish features. Medieval dark fantasy game application with excellent UI/UX implementation. All major features working correctly including event ticker, sticky navigation, mobile hamburger menu, animated counters, pagination, modal forms, and tab switching.

ui_bugs.issue: Error message not clearly displayed for wrong credentials

design_issues.issue: Star ratings not clearly visible (gold stars not prominently displayed)

passed_tests: Event ticker with colored category badges scrolls smoothly
Sticky navbar remains visible on scroll
Hero section displays 'Realm of Aethoria' heading and CTA buttons
Online counter shows 3 animated stats with formatted numbers
About section displays 4 mini-stat cards correctly
Features pagination with numbered buttons (1-5) and 'Showing X-Y of 42' text
Leaderboard has rank medals (crown/shield emojis) and growth percentages
News section shows chronicles with proper dates
Register modal creates users successfully with success feedback
Footer contains 'Your Legend Awaits' heading and both CTA buttons
Navigation anchor links scroll to correct sections
All 12 backend API endpoints working (authentication, data fetching)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI enhancement: Consider making login modal error messages more prominent and enhance star rating visibility in testimonials section. Overall excellent implementation of Phase 3 features.
